svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ POINT CLOUD PROCESSING │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
Point Cloud: Set of 3D points (x, y, z) + optional attributes (color, normal)
Common Operations: ───────────────── • Filtering: Remove outliers, downsample • Registration: Align multiple point clouds (ICP) • Segmentation: Separate objects/planes • Classification: PointNet, PointNet++
